audit_items.proof_trace: DecodeArrayPool lacks per-item exception isolation; one malformed blob tx throws RlpException which propagates through ProtocolHandlerBase.Deserialize (re-throws at L54), causing entire TransactionsMessage batch to fail and peer disconnect at ZeroNettyP2PHandler.ExceptionCaught L129-133.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends TransactionsMessage containing 99 valid txs plus 1 blob tx with malformed RLP blob wrapper; DecodeByteArrays throws RlpException on invalid sequence prefix, batch decode fails mid-loop, all 99 valid txs are lost, peer is disconnected with DisconnectReason.Exception.
